title: EndCheckOperator Property
description:
This property sets the combination conditions when using several end conditions of the force guide object.

When specifying AND, if all of the enabled end conditions are satisfied, the force guide object execution has been completed and it determined as succeeded.

When specifying OR, if all of the enabled end conditions are satisfied, the force guide object execution has been completed and it determined as succeeded.

Values

OR Combine as OR condition.

AND Combine as AND condition.

Default:  Disabled

See Also: EndCheckOperator Property

FollowCheckTolF Property
see_also:
Applies To

Relax Object, FollowMove Object, Press Object, PressMove Object
